reviews.review_description: Tycoon Pizza Café is a deliciously entertaining game for strategy lovers and foodies alike. With mouth-watering visuals, strategic depth, and engaging progression, it’s a must-play

The VR-first approach shines—interacting directly with ingredients, machines, and customer waits feels believable and engaging. Setting up your café and handling every stage of pizza prep is delightfully hands-on and immersive

I was so excited seeing there's a Tycoon game. I loved gaining the employees and extra veggies to grow for my pizza. But I got all the tables (3), got a chef and helper for each table, filled my plot with veggies, and that was all. All that space and there's no upgrade building it getting extra tables. That sucks. I'd keep playing if there was more.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Jaszz, For playing and interest in game.
Actually we had kept there like end point. But I'm glad that you like to keep playing game. We have Idea upgrade game in future. So for now we have kept this game free to play to analyze user interest.

reviews.review_title: I've been waiting for a tycoon game!
reviews.review_description:
Thank you for making this because I've searched every month for a tycoon game.


Pro: finally a tycoon game, when you walk up to the stations it put you in it and I think that is so cool. It really cute and relaxing and I love seeing the tycoon games I've always loved playing but In a first person pov. 

Con:  I bought the corn and the register and the place where you cook and serve the people and that's all i had enough for. But once I checked out the first group of people I was stuck with dishes in my hand and not enough for the dish washer and couldn't grab more corn because there was dishes in my hand. Not sure If I just did something wrong I'm gonna see if I can redo it and try again.

developer_response.body: Hello! markar665 Your review is really confusing. Did you really like the game? then you would set more stars. Also if you have any bad experience with game then please let us know. Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
Mario like-A pizza SMG4🇮🇹🍕🍕🍕boiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiii

Jus some gitches could be fixed
There should be multiplayer in this game and it would be way better

developer_response.body:
Thanks RTcahzyy_
Yes, we are working on making it better in single player then multiplayer.

reviews.review_description: But add more details to the customers , characters and environment, including the graphics as well. More pizza environments could be added.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Of course we are working on it and will have more advance features in upcoming game version.
